title: Wyl (disambiguation)
content:
Wyl could refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Wyl Lark]], a [[New Republic]] [[pilot]]
*[[Wyl sector]], a [[sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]]

==Legends==
*[[Wyl Tarson]], an undercover agent for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*[[Wyl sector/Legends|Wyl sector]], a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
*[[Wyle Ulbreck]], a resident of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Disambig}}
